docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $90.00) SERVED NOV-14-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2007 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT , CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO THE DEFENDANT BILL FERGUSON, RETURNED "NOT DELIVERABLE ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 13, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO BILL FERGUSON.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
